name: Marina Green
summary_en: Planning documents show Marina Green as an events and waterfront site — a 2011 draft environmental impact report places the 34th America's Cup 'AC Village' there, a 2002 mitigated negative declaration covers the adjacent San Francisco marina renovation, and a 1993 Doyle Drive task-force report and a 1965 Golden Gate Freeway technical report describe its bayfront setting. Recreation and Park Commission minutes and operations agendas note boardsailing events, parking-lot use, and shrubbery loss, and 'What's doing in the parks' bulletins list art shows and adoption events on the green. Marina Green is operated by the Recreation and Park Department, whose FY2025 budget line is about $250M. No contract in the data names it.
